trusted_boundary: RefinedRust upstream implementation and generated Radium model until proof-checking
Rocq/Coq kernel and imported proof libraries
Rust compiler semantics not modeled by the admitted RefinedRust surface
surface manifests that intentionally exclude unsupported Rust features
notes: RefinedRust evidence may be promoted into zkf-ir-spec/verification-ledger.json only after cargo refinedrust and dune build both pass for the target surface.
A generated translation without a passing Rocq build is not counted as mechanized_local.
Unsupported Rust features must narrow the target capsule rather than weaken the claim.
